item.title: Wiring Is a Delicate Job
item.description: A closer look at the patience and precision needed for successful automotive wiring work. What’s the trickiest part of electrical repairs?

item.title: Defender Stops in a Game Reserve
item.description: A Defender adventure takes an unexpected pause while traveling through a game reserve. What would you do in a situation like this?

item.title: He Even Swapped the Tow Mirrors
item.description: A truck gets an upgrade with a tow mirror swap that changes both function and appearance. Are tow mirrors worth the upgrade?

item.title: A Wiring Cleanup Project
item.description: A wiring project focuses on organizing and repairing electrical systems for better reliability and function. Why is wiring work so detail-oriented?

item.title: Restoring a Neglected Tri-Axle

item.title: Fixing GMT800 Keyless Entry
item.description: A keyless entry issue on a GMT800 platform is diagnosed and repaired step by step. What’s usually behind electrical problems like this?

item.title: 1-Inch Impact Wrench Test
item.description: A heavy-duty 1-inch impact wrench is put to the test to see how it performs under real workshop conditions. Can bigger tools make jobs easier?

item.title: Fixing Up a Classic Bronco
item.description: A Bronco project gets attention with repairs, upgrades, and hands-on troubleshooting in the garage. What would you restore first on a classic truck?
